ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-20-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. vallejo, CSR. Brenda Fields.
Petitioner, D'artanian A. woodard present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Petition was not signed by the mother of the minor.
The matter is ordered off calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-12-2003 Reset To Jun-19-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR. Valerie Papale.
Petitioner, D'Artanian A. Woodard present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court ordered this matter continued to June 19, 2003 at 9:00 AM. for appearance by the minor's mother.
